welcome_user:
🎬 Movie Linker
Find movies via Instagram reels!

Select your language:
welcome_admin:
🎬 Movie Linker — Admin Panel
Welcome back, Administrator!
lang_set_user: ✅ System language has been set to English!
lang_set_admin: ✅ Successfully logged in as Admin. Control panel is now active.
force_sub: ⚠️ To use this bot, please subscribe to the following channels:
sub_success: ✅ Thank you! Now send a reel link or movie code.
not_subbed_yet: ❌ You haven't subscribed to all channels yet!
send_link: 📎 Send an Instagram reel link, movie code, or /top.
add_movie_hint:
📹 Add movie:
1. Send the video to this chat.
2. The bot stores file_id temporarily.
3. Send metadata like:
Movie title | Rating | Language | Note

Link reel: /link_reel <code> <instagram_reel_link>
movie_wizard_meta_prompt:
File ID received. Now send movie metadata:

Movie title | Rating | Language | Note

Example: Inception | 8.8 | English | Nolan movie
Required: movie title only.
movie_wizard_format_error:
❌ Invalid format. Send at least the movie title:
Movie title | Rating | Language | Note
link_reel_error: ❌ Could not link reel. Check code or URL.
top_movies_hint: Send a movie code to watch it.
movie_add_format_error:
❌ Invalid format!
Fallback: /add_movie <file_id> <title> <rating> <language> [note]
Recommended: send a video, then metadata.
movie_db_write_error: ❌ There was a problem writing to the database.
movie_delivery_error: ❌ Could not send the movie. Please contact the administrator.
subscription_check_error: ❌ Subscription check failed. Please try again later.
contact_required: Please share your phone number to use this bot.
contact_saved: ✅ Contact saved. Now send a reel link, movie code, or /top.
contact_invalid: ❌ Please share only your own Telegram contact.
contact_save_error: ❌ Could not save your contact. Please try again.
